title: peristylus albidus
intro: Peristylus albidus, also known as the white peristylus, is a species of orchid native to India. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from respiratory distress. Peristylus albidus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, making it accessible for those seeking natural remedies.
